name: Crab Cakes with Pasilla Chili Aioli
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Mix the cooked crab with mayonnaise, carrots, celery, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and cayenne in a bowl until well combined.
3. Place two slices of bread on top of the crab mixture and press down gently to form patties.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining tablespoon of salad oil with the cilantro sprigs.
5. Transfer the crab cakes to an oven-safe dish and bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Serve warm with the cilantro oil drizzled on top.
